Package com.nib.commons.io

Class FileDescriptor

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.FileDescriptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class FileDescriptor extends Object implements Cloneable, Serializable
Describes the file characteristics
